nodes.context: One-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1990 in Moordrecht, Netherlands, involved in violent crime, extortion, drug trade, and arms trafficking.
Outlaw motorcycle club with chapters in the Netherlands and Belgium, involved in a feud with Satudarah.
Consultative body of major motorcycle clubs in the Netherlands, of which Satudarah was a member until expelled in 2011.

edges.context: Satudarah and Hells Angels had a feud in the Netherlands in 2011, and Satudarah competed with Hells Angels in Belgium.
Satudarah was a member of the Council of Eight, a consultative body of motorcycle clubs, until expelled in 2011.
